title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: A YouTuber tested a leaked model appearing as Oceanus V1-P (possibly called Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, and game tasks. The model scored 70/70 in testing and reportedly outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other major models on tasks including web app development, combinatorics, and agentic workflows.
